inputs.lead_data: Lead 1: Ahmad Khalil, CTO at CloudServe (45 employees, SaaS), visited pricing page 3 times, downloaded whitepaper, attended webinar. Lead 3: James Chen, CEO at DataPulse (18 employees, analytics SaaS), booked demo, engaged on LinkedIn, company raised Series A last month.
